header.description: Single-row header context. Contains the report date passed as a runtime parameter for display in the report title area.

rows.description: One row per flow meter after MELT reshape of neuract__FM_TABLE. Source table is first filtered by timestamp_utc within the report date window, then melted from wide to long. Each output row contains the meter label (FM_101..FM_106), its instantaneous flow reading in m³/h, the cumulative totalizer in m³, and a static 'Active' status.

totals.description: Single aggregate row. total_flow is the sum of all row_totalizer values across the six melted meter rows within the report date window.

semantics: report_date is a pass-through display parameter (PARAM) rendered in the header. It also implicitly defines the date context for the operator. The optional date_from and date_to parameters apply as range filters on neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc to control which source rows are included before the MELT and aggregation steps.
transformations: MELT neuract__FM_TABLE: unpivot columns FM_101, FM_102, FM_103, FM_104, FM_105, FM_106 — their string column names become row_meter_id label values and their numeric data values become row_reading values

Simultaneously unpivot FM_101_TOTALIZER, FM_102_TOTALIZER, FM_103_TOTALIZER, FM_104_TOTALIZER, FM_105_TOTALIZER, FM_106_TOTALIZER aligned position-wise with the reading melt to produce row_totalizer values
Inject static constant string 'Active' as row_status for every melted row — no catalog column exists for operational status
Aggregate total_flow as SUM(row_totalizer) across all six melted meter rows for the filtered date window
